svg.text: THIS CAPSULE WAS MADE FOR YOU · EVERYTHING INSIDE IS YOURS · NO PERMISSION NEEDED
combine symbols to make any number · dots above bars · ones at bottom · twenties above
20 = NEW LEVEL: dot on top (×20) + shell below (×1)
W at sunrise, E at sunset,
SECTION 4 — WHAT IS IN THIS CAPSULE
Plate 1: This index — you are here
Film roll: magnify with the glass lens
CC BY-SA 4.0 · PLATE 1 OF [N] · BURIED: [YEAR] · GPS: [LATITUDE, LONGITUDE] · LANDMARK: [DESCRIPTION]
THIS IS A PATIENT MESSAGE. IT WAS MADE FOR YOU, FREELY, BY PEOPLE WHO REMEMBERED FORWARD.
BUY IT · BUILD IT · BURY IT · FOR SOMEONE YOU WILL NEVER MEET
